channel.title: Container Labels on Niklas Precenth - Purview, Copilot & Microsoft 365
channel.description: Recent content in Container Labels on Niklas Precenth - Purview, Copilot & Microsoft 365

item.title: Stop Chasing Empty AdvancedSettings: Verifying Container Label Settings the Right Way
item.description: A practical (and corrected) guide to enforcing owner-only sharing with container sensitivity labels — and how to verify it without getting misled by cmdlet naming.
